summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AiSteth React app (onboarding flow + history dashboard) and standalone vanilla-JS scan page entry point. All 8 user stories validated successfully.
passed_tests: US1: Onboarding step 1 (Welcome) - All required data-testids present (app-header-brand-link, app-header-scan-button, app-header-history-button, onboarding-step-indicator, onboarding-hero-title, onboarding-welcome-continue-button)
US2: Onboarding step 2 (Consent) - Consent checkbox, Next/Back buttons present. Next button correctly disabled until consent checkbox is checked, then becomes enabled
US3: Onboarding step 3 (Ready to scan) - Start scan button present, clicking navigates to /aisteth.html
US4: History page - All stat tiles present (history-stats-total-scans, history-stats-latest-hr, history-stats-latest-spo2, history-stats-latest-rr), new scan button present

US5: History with seeded data - Successfully seeded 2 assessment+snapshot records via backend API. Scan cards render correctly with vitals. Modal opens with all tabs (Overview, QRISK3, Narrative). Close button works

US6: /aisteth.html static page - Loads without page-level JS errors. Key elements present: aisteth-start-btn, aisteth-calc-btn, brand text 'AiSteth', scan-page-back-to-history-button. Note: aisteth-risk-btn is hidden by default (correct behavior - only shown after vitals are locked)
US7: Catch-all route - Navigating to /some-bad-path correctly renders onboarding page
US8: Responsive mobile (390x844) - All onboarding elements visible and clickable on mobile viewport
